desc: Catching Exception and only printing it suppresses all failures in the mean-age analysis, preventing callers from detecting or handling them.
Using the module-level random generator without seed injection makes computed columns nondeterministic and tests or analyses irreproducible.
Storing and mutating the DataFrame through GLOBAL_DF introduces hidden shared state and makes repeated, concurrent, and isolated use error-prone.
The function combines data creation, random transformation, validation, statistical analysis, error handling, and console output, making it difficult to reuse and test.
The analysis function returns no result and exposes output only through printing and global mutation, unnecessarily coupling callers to side effects.
